glue.schemaversion.schema.RegistryName.Docs: The name of the registry where the schema is stored. Either `SchemaArn`, or `SchemaName` and `RegistryName` has to be provided.

glue.schemaversion.schema.SchemaArn.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the schema. Either `SchemaArn`, or `SchemaName` and `RegistryName` has to be provided.

glue.schemaversion.schema.SchemaName.Docs: The name of the schema. Either `SchemaArn`, or `SchemaName` and `RegistryName` has to be provided.
